headline: Berenberg Affirms Why Accenture plc (ACN) is one of the Best Falling Stocks
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is one of the best falling stocks to invest in, according to analysts. On June 17, Berenberg reiterated a Buy rating on Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) and lowered the price target to $220 from $273. Despite the cut, the new price target represents significant upside potential. Berenberg cut the stock’s price target to […]
